title: From Hunting to Blueprint
problem: Adding a feature required reading 5+ files to infer the pattern. Each file only showed part of the contract. Errors were likely.
decision: blueprint.json at repo root defines what exists — categories, features, asset types, templates. config/ directory holds per-item declarations. validate-blueprint.js enforces consistency.
lesson: The blueprint is the map. The code is the territory. Read the map first.
impact: 5-minute feature addition instead of 30 minutes of inference. Self-documenting system.
